name: Tec-9 | 上古图腾
descriptionEn: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. A pale green and beige pattern of ancient tiles has been applied. \"Hope remains, even for those began their journey down the wrong path\"
descriptionZh: 一把T进行机动作战的理想手枪，Tec-9 可以在近距离造成致命伤害，且弹匣容量较高。 这把武器使用了浅绿与米色相搭配的花纹。 \"我们必须对生活先有信心，然后才能使生活永远延续下去，而所谓信心，就是希望。\"
